memories.text: store auth session tokens in http-only cookies so client-side JavaScript cannot read them
the CI pipeline runs vitest unit tests first and only then the playwright end-to-end suite
supabase-js upsert cannot target a partial unique index, so use check-then-insert with a 23505 race fallback
Vercel Hobby tier caps cron jobs at one run per day, so the embedding backfill runs daily not hourly
Gemini embeddings are not unit-normalized below 3072 dimensions, so L2-normalize the 384-dim vectors in code
agent writes use the admin service-role client and never auth.uid, because the agent has no browser session
two teammates editing the same file within fifteen minutes triggers a file-overlap collision alert
refuse to persist any memory whose text looks like an API key or private key, detected by regex before insert
recall ranking decays a memory's importance with an exponential half-life of thirty days
the browser memory panel subscribes to postgres_changes over an authenticated realtime socket to live-update
